name: Rhomboid
description: Full slanted squares leaning together, each parallelogram re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(28% 0, 100% 0, 72% 100%, 0 100%); clip-path: polygon(28% 0, 100% 0, 72% 100%, 0 100%); opacity: @rand(0.8, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
